metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5128
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1a: CC2D1A (aka. Freud-1) protein expression in hippocampal CA1 tissue was lowest at E18 and postnatal day 1 as compared to young and adult mice.

Figure 1b: biochemical fractions showed CC2D1A was present at both pre- and post-synapse.

Figure 6: Effects of Cc2d1a deletion on expression of AMPAR and NMDAR subunits, mEPSCs, and evoked NMDAR-mediated EPSCs in the hippocampal CA1 region.. Experimental description: Results, Figure 1 legend: "Representative immunoblotting analysis showing the subcellular localization of CC2D1A in P35 mouse hippocampal CA1 lysates"

antibody:
CC2D1A (1:1000; Proteintech, catalog #16816-1-AP, RRID:AB_2275394)
